/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libmy_custom_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so -o libmy_custom_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so CMakeFiles/my_custom_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/my_custom_msgs/msg/detail/lidar_data__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_custom_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/my_custom_msgs/msg/detail/lidar_datas__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/galactic/lib: /opt/ros/galactic/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/galactic/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/galactic/lib/librcutils.so -ldl /opt/ros/galactic/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so
